detection_points.name: Chain link count
detection_points.description: The chain must contain exactly 13 visible chain links between the top connector and bottom charm connector.

detection_points.name: Top attachment integrity
detection_points.description: The top ring, connector, and pad attachment must be present and properly attached.

detection_points.name: Bottom charm attachment integrity
detection_points.description: The bottom charm connector and pendant ring must be present and properly attached.

detection_points.name: Link alignment
detection_points.description: Chain links should hang in the expected sequence without abnormal twisting, bending, or misassembly.

detection_points.name: Surface finish integrity
detection_points.description: Gold-tone chain links should not show visible cracks, chips, severe scratches, or plating loss.

detection_points.name: Incidental abnormality
detection_points.description: Visible abnormalities should be reported even if not explicitly requested.
